file_insights.purpose: Data access layer for Category entities
key_features: Paginated queries with filtering and search

file_insights.purpose: Business logic layer for category operations
file_insights.note: File content truncated in git diff

patterns_discovered.description: Clean separation between data access and business logic
patterns_discovered.implementation: CategoryRepository handles all Prisma operations with typed interfaces

patterns_discovered.description: All queries include organizationId for multi-tenant safety
patterns_discovered.implementation: Every repository method requires organizationId parameter

patterns_discovered.description: Deleted records are filtered using notDeleted utility
patterns_discovered.implementation: All read operations include ...notDeleted in where clauses

patterns_discovered.description: Explicit interfaces for query parameters and return types
Safe pagination with normalization and bounds checking
patterns_discovered.implementation: perPage clamped between 1 and MAX_PER_PAGE, page >= 1

patterns_discovered.description: Constructor injection of PrismaClient via tsyringe container
Convenience methods that throw AppException if not found

patterns_discovered.implementation: parentId field, children relations, sortOrder field

gotchas_discovered.description: The git diff output was truncated at 41093 characters, missing the complete category.service.ts implementation
gotchas_discovered.impact: Cannot fully analyze service layer implementation details

gotchas_discovered.description: slugExists() method allows same slug in different menus, but not within same menu
gotchas_discovered.impact: Slug collision possible across menus; ensure menu context is always checked

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Parent category validation not enforced in repository
gotchas_discovered.description: No validation that parentId exists or belongs to same menu when creating/updating
gotchas_discovered.impact: Should be handled at service layer; invalid parent references possible

gotchas_discovered.description: DEFAULT_PER_PAGE (50) may not match API expectations; MAX_PER_PAGE (100) enforces hard limit
gotchas_discovered.impact: Clients requesting > 100 items will be silently capped

gotchas_discovered.description: Search queries use 'insensitive' mode for name, slug, and description
gotchas_discovered.impact: Performance implication on large datasets; consider adding indexes

approach_outcome.summary: Successfully created Category repository and service files with comprehensive CRUD operations, proper tenant isolation, and soft delete support
approach_outcome.documentation_level: excellent - extensive JSDoc comments with examples
key_accomplishments: Fully functional repository with 15+ CRUD methods
potential_improvements: Add database indexes for slug and parentId queries
Implement caching for frequently accessed categories
Add transaction support for reordering operations

recommendations.recommendation: Validate parentId existence and menu scope at service layer
recommendations.rationale: Repository doesn't validate parent-child relationships; prevents orphaned categories

recommendations.recommendation: Add unit tests for pagination edge cases
recommendations.rationale: Pagination normalization logic should be thoroughly tested with boundary values

recommendations.recommendation: Consider adding database indexes for frequently queried fields
recommendations.rationale: slug, menuId, parentId queries would benefit from indexes for performance

recommendations.recommendation: Document slug uniqueness constraints in API documentation
recommendations.rationale: Clients should understand slug uniqueness is per-menu, not global

recommendations.recommendation: Add query performance monitoring for findAll with search
recommendations.rationale: OR-based text search on large datasets may need optimization
Would provide recovery capability for accidentally deleted categories
